runs.note: Migrated OAuth client from vulnerable implicit flow to secure authorization code flow with PKCE. Key changes: (1) Changed response_type from 'token' to 'code', (2) Implemented PKCE with S256 method using proper code verifier generation and SHA-256 challenge, (3) Added state parameter for CSRF protection, (4) Modified handleCallback to exchange authorization code for tokens instead of parsing tokens from URL fragments, (5) Changed token storage from localStorage to memory storage to mitigate XSS risks per security requirements.
